mapper.insert: INSERT INTO doc_updates (document_id, vector_clock, update_data, is_snapshot, parent_update_id) VALUES (#{documentId}, #{vectorClock}, #{updateData,jdbcType=BLOB}, #{isSnapshot}, #{parentUpdateId})

INSERT INTO doc_updates (document_id, vector_clock, update_data, is_snapshot, parent_update_id) VALUES
(#{item.documentId}, #{item.vectorClock}, #{item.updateData,jdbcType=BLOB}, #{item.isSnapshot}, #{item.parentUpdateId})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM doc_updates WHERE document_id = #{documentId} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM doc_updates WHERE document_id = #{documentId} ORDER BY created_at ASC, id ASC
